name: paas-service

metadata.name: paas-service
metadata.summary: A Django application for developing BK-PaaS add-on services.

documentation:
# Paas Service

蓝鲸 PaaS 平台增强服务框架


## 版本历史

详见 `CHANGES.md`。

## 使用指南

1. 更新 settings：
```python
INSTALLED_APPS = [
    ...
    'paas_service',
    ...
]

MIDDLEWARE = [
    ...
    'paas_service.auth.middleware.VerifiedClientMiddleware',
    ...
]

# 数据库敏感字段加密 Key
BKKRILL_ENCRYPT_SECRET_KEY = base64.b64encode(b'\x01' * 32)

# 与 PaaS 平台通信的 JWT 信息
PAAS_SERVICE_JWT_CLIENTS = [
    {
        "iss": "paas-v3",
        "key": "123..........",
        "algorithm": "HS256",
    },
]

# 增强服务供应商类
PAAS_SERVICE_PROVIDER_CLS = "svc_xxx.vendor.provider.Provider"
# 增强服务实例信息渲染函数
PAAS_SERVICE_SVC_INSTANCE_RENDER_FUNC = "svc_xxx.vendor.render.render_instance_data"

# 设置语言，注意：目前国际化只支持: 简体中文 和 English
LANGUAGE_CODE = 'zh-cn'

LANGUAGES = [("zh-cn", "简体中文"), ("en", "English")]
```

2. 单元测试

首先，安装 pytest、pytest-django。

然后执行 `make test` 运行所有单元测试。

functions.name: paas_service.utils.gen_unique_id
documentation:
Generate an unique id via given name
:param name 原字符串
:param namespace 字符串命名空间，区分不同领域
:param reserve_length 原字符串保留长度
:param divide_char 特殊串和原串的连接符

functions.name: paas_service.utils.get_paas_app_info
documentation: Get instance's related PaaS app infomations Dict

functions.name: paas_service.utils.parse_redirect_params
documentation:
从 redirect_url 构建出重定向指令的参数
\>>> parse_redirect_params(redirect_url="instance.index?a=1&b=1&b=2&c=3")
('instance.index', {'a': '1', 'b': '2', 'c': '3'})

functions.name: paas_service.utils.generate_password
documentation: 生成随机的由大小写字母和数字组成的且至少包含 1 位 数字的密码.

functions.name: paas_service.utils.get_node_ip
documentation: 获取当前节点IP. 使用 helm 部署时, 在 values.yaml 中注入 NODE_IP 这个环境变量.
WR Algorithm end

classes.name: paas_service.utils.WRItem
documentation: A single weighted-random items
WR Algorithm start

methods.name: paas_service.utils.WRItemList.from_json
documentation:
Generate a list object from json, an example items_list:

[
    {"values": ANY_THING, "weight": 10},
    {"values": ANY_THING, "weight": 3},
]

methods.name: paas_service.utils.WRItemList.initalize
documentation: Caculate weight and generate a list of size 100 in order to archive the random choice

methods.name: paas_service.utils.WRItemList.get
documentation: Pick a item based on weighted-random algorithm

methods.name: paas_service.utils.Base36Handler.encode
documentation:
Encode a positive number in Base X

Arguments:
- `num`: The number to encode
- `alphabet`: The alphabet to use for encoding

methods.name: paas_service.utils.Base36Handler.decode
documentation:
Decode a Base X encoded string into the number

Arguments:
- `string`: The encoded string
- `alphabet`: The alphabet to use for encoding

functions.name: paas_service.auth.backends._sign_token
documentation:
Sign a new JWT token using given client's credentials, this token can be used
for an InstanceAuthBackend's authentication process.

:returns: a JWT token which will expires after 3600 seconds
:raises: ValueError if given client name is not valid

Validates given JWT payload, a valid payload must contain at least 2 fields:

classes.name: paas_service.serializers.PaaSAppInfoSLZ
documentation:
Serializer for Application Info from Blueking PaaS.

Only `app_id` was required.

classes.name: paas_service.serializers._SpecDefinitionUpsertSLZ
documentation: Serializer for admin api #

classes.name: paas_service.serializers.ServiceUpsertSLZ
documentation:
Usage
\# For Update
\>>> slz = ServiceUpsertSLZ(data={}, instance=service)
\>>> slz.is_valid(True)
\>>> slz.save()

\# For Create
\>>> slz = ServiceUpsertSLZ(data={})
\>>> slz.is_valid(True)
\>>> slz.save()

classes.name: paas_service.serializers.PlanUpsertSLZ
documentation:
Usage
\# For Update
\>>> slz = PlanUpsertSLZ(data={}, instance=plan)
\>>> slz.is_valid(True)
\>>> slz.save()

\# For Create
\>>> slz = PlanUpsertSLZ(data={})
\>>> slz.is_valid(True)
\>>> slz.save()
